headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.gstatic.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseapp.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.firebaseapp.com wss://*.firebaseio.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com https://accounts.google.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';
